description_long: This is a modern, boxy residential house set on a large rectangular plot of green lawn. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and a mix of white and dark brown exterior walls, accented by numerous rectangular windows. A driveway leads to a garage on one side, while the opposite side of the property includes a fenced backyard with a swimming pool and a circular above-ground structure, possibly a hot tub or trampoline. Several trees and shrubs provide landscaping around the house, especially near the backyard and pool area. The main entrance is marked by a small porch with steps and a single tree nearby, and the overall design emphasizes clean lines and functional outdoor spaces. The property is surrounded by open grass, giving it a spacious suburban feel.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and dark brown walls, large windows, a garage, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with a tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the car parked near the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, circular structure, and dense tree coverage.
description_view_3: Backyard-focused view with the pool, circular structure, and extensive greenery visible behind the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single front door, accented by a nearby tree and minimal overhang.
